query: PET-MRI brachytherapy planning advantages sequential PET-CT
citations: [Staging of Cervical Cancer: A Practical Approach Using MRI and FDG PET.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/37459457/)
[Combining amino acid PET and MRI imaging increases accuracy to define malignant areas in adult glioma.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/37516762/)
[PET/MRI of Hepatic 90Y Microsphere Deposition Determines Individual Tumor Response.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/26721589/)

[The clinical efficacy of PSMA PET/MRI in biochemically recurrent prostate cancer compared with standard of care imaging modalities and confirmatory histopathology: results of a single-centre, prospective clinical trial.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/32519046/)

evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 37459457. 2023/11/01 00:00. PURPOSE: The purpose of our study is to determine if there is a relationship 
between dose deposition measured by PET/MRI and individual lesion response to 
yttr
evidence.source_title: Staging of Cervical Cancer: A Practical Approach Using MRI and FDG PET.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 37459457. 2023/11/01 00:00. PURPOSE: The purpose of our study is to determine if there is a relationship 
between dose deposition measured by PET/MRI and individual lesion response to 
yttrium-90 ((90)Y) microsphere radioembolization.
MATERIALS AND METHODS: 26 patients undergoing lobar treatment with (90)Y 
microspheres underwent PET/MRI within 66 h of treatment and had follow-up 
imaging available. Adequate visualization of tumor was available in 24 patients, 
and contours were drawn
